description: Regime-conditioned weight allocator configuration for soft gating

regime_risk_budgets.description: Maximum total exposure per regime (prevents concentration)

comments.k_shrinkage: Sample size shrinkage constant - higher = more conservative with small samples
comments.min_weight: Minimum allocation floor (1%) - prevents hard zeros, allows 'earning back'
comments.min_trades: Minimum trades for reliable edge estimate
comments.alpha: Sigmoid steepness - higher = more winner-takes-all behavior
comments.regime_risk_budgets: CRISIS=30% prevents forced allocation, RISK_ON=80% allows normal operation
